div.p: The enqueue is logically complete once Step 1 CAS succeeds. Even if the thread crashes before Step 2, the element is reachable by traversing head.
If a thread finds tail->next != NULL, it knows the global tail pointer is lagging. It will attempt Step 2 on behalf of the lagging thread (Lock-free cooperation).

g.title: Atomic Compare-and-Swap on tail->next memory address
Atomic update of Global Tail Pointer (Swing pointer to new node)
